description: Daisy Cloud Dream Fragrance Layering KitDaisy Cloud Dream combines Daisy Eau de Toilette + Cloud Eau de Parfum for a layered scent profile that feels more dimensional, intentional, and memorable than either fragrance alone. Fresh florals and coconut praline create a youthful dreamy signature with softness.Inspired by Pinterest scent stacking and Lemon8, this kit gives shoppers a ready-made pairing instead of forcing them to guess what to mix. Wear one fragrance as the base and the other as the topper to create contrast, depth, and a fuller dry down.Included Layering Pair Daisy Eau de Toilette Cloud Eau de Parfum Scent ProfileFresh florals and coconut praline create a youthful dreamy signature with softness. Shop the Individual FragrancesEach kit is built from two individual perfumes that can also be sampled on their own. Daisy Eau de Toilette Cloud Eau de Parfum
descriptionHtml:
Daisy Cloud Dream Fragrance Layering Kit

Daisy Cloud Dream combines Daisy Eau de Toilette + Cloud Eau de Parfum for a layered scent profile that feels more dimensional, intentional, and memorable than either fragrance alone. Fresh florals and coconut praline create a youthful dreamy signature with softness.

Inspired by Pinterest scent stacking and Lemon8, this kit gives shoppers a ready-made pairing instead of forcing them to guess what to mix. Wear one fragrance as the base and the other as the topper to create contrast, depth, and a fuller dry down.

Included Layering Pair

  • Daisy Eau de Toilette
  • Cloud Eau de Parfum

Scent Profile

Fresh florals and coconut praline create a youthful dreamy signature with softness.

Shop the Individual Fragrances

Each kit is built from two individual perfumes that can also be sampled on their own.

  • Daisy Eau de Toilette
  • Cloud Eau de Parfum
short_description: Fresh daisies and coconut praline blend into a youthful airy floral dream.

descriptionHtml:
Flowerbomb La Vie Fragrance Layering Kit

Flowerbomb La Vie combines Flowerbomb Eau de Parfum + La Vie Est Belle Eau de Parfum for a layered scent profile that feels more dimensional, intentional, and memorable than either fragrance alone. Rose and jasmine explode into iris-praline warmth for a feminine luxury blend.

Inspired by Community layering favorite, this kit gives shoppers a ready-made pairing instead of forcing them to guess what to mix. Wear one fragrance as the base and the other as the topper to create contrast, depth, and a fuller dry down.

Included Layering Pair

  • Flowerbomb Eau de Parfum
  • La Vie Est Belle Eau de Parfum

Scent Profile

Rose and jasmine explode into iris-praline warmth for a feminine luxury blend.

Shop the Individual Fragrances

Each kit is built from two individual perfumes that can also be sampled on their own.

  • Flowerbomb Eau de Parfum
  • La Vie Est Belle Eau de Parfum
short_description: Rose-jasmine sparkle and iris-praline sweetness create a lush feminine luxury combo.

Fruity Floral Heaven combines Club De Nuit Woman Perfume Oil + Lattafa Mayar Eau de Parfum for a layered scent profile that feels more dimensional, intentional, and memorable than either fragrance alone. Musky florals elevate juicy fruity density into a compliment-magnet layering combo.
